title: Project Profile v1
description: Deterministic probe output. No LLM involved. Same repo state -> identical profile (sorted, stable). Refs: docs/migration/0002 §Project Probe schema.

schema_version.description: Schema major version. Bump on breaking probe output change.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp. Pattern (not format) for ajv-cli compatibility without ajv-formats.

generator.description: Tool + version that produced this profile (e.g. '@ress/claude-agents@1.0.0').

monorepo.description: Detected via workspaces field, multiple package manifests, or AGENTS.md hint.

name.$comment: Lowercase. Examples: go, python, typescript, yaml, dockerfile.

primary.description: True for the language with the highest non-vendor file count. Exactly one entry should have primary=true unless languages is empty.

languages.$comment: Sorted by files descending, then name asc, for determinism.

frameworks.$comment: Detected from manifest files (package.json deps, go.mod, pom.xml, requirements.txt, Chart.yaml). Sorted asc.

build_systems.$comment: e.g. go-modules, npm, pnpm, yarn, gradle, maven, helm, terraform.

files_signatures.description: Quick boolean / string flags for common patterns. Keys are stable; new keys may be added across minor versions.

test_framework.$comment: Free-form identifier. Examples: go-test, jest, pytest, vitest, junit, rspec.

domain_hints.description: Hints scraped from AGENTS.md / README headings. Lowercase, kebab-case (e.g. microservice, api-gateway, ticketing).

constraints.description: User overrides from .claude-agents.yml. Honored by match.ts.
